title: MostBet Pragmatic Play Drops & Wins – €25 Million Prize Pool
description: MostBet Pragmatic Play Drops & Wins – €25 million prize pool.
content:
Play MostBet Pragmatic Play Drops & Wins for a share of €25 million.

Spin slots like Sweet Bonanza, Sugar Rush and Big Bass Bonanza.

Cash and free spins prizes are available on the best online slots.

Register using MostBet promo code HUGE for a welcome reward.

Play the MostBet Pragmatic Play Drops & Wins Event

The MostBet Pragmatic Play event runs from March 4, 2026, to April 1, 2026.

To enter this MostBet casino tournament, players must complete the following steps:

  1. Register or log in to your MostBet account.
  2. Visit the casino lobby.
  3. Launch participating Pragmatic Play slots.
  4. Spin the reels on games like Sweet Bonanza, Gates of Olympus and more.
  5. Collect wheel pieces or score points in the daily tournaments.

Pragmatic Play Prizes

Players at MostBet casino can win from two prize Drops and Wins promotions during the promotional period.

Weekly Wheel Drops

Any spin on participating Pragmatic Play slots can activate a piece of the prize wheel. Players must collect three pieces of the wheel. Once the wheel is completed, the player becomes eligible for a reward from the €350,000 weekly prize pool, with 96,900 prizes available.

Daily Slots Tournaments

Players can also compete in Daily Tournaments by spinning Pragmatic Play slots at the MostBet casino.

To qualify, players must bet €0.15 or more on selected slots. Only the first 5,000 qualifying bets per day count toward the tournament.

The top rewards from the €20,000 daily prize pool include:

  • 1st place – €3,000
  • 2nd place – €2,000
  • 3rd–4th – €1,000
  • 5th–10th – €500
  • 11th–20th – €200
  • 21st–40th – €100

Play the Best Online Slots at MostBet

The Drops & Wins event includes dozens of popular Pragmatic Play slots available at MostBet casino. Players can spin some of the best online slots, including:

  • Sweet Bonanza
  • Gates of Olympus
  • Sugar Rush
  • The Dog House Megaways
  • Starlight Princess
  • Big Bass Bonanza
  • Wild West Gold
  • Fruit Party
  • 5 Lions Megaways
  • Wolf Gold

Terms and Conditions

Check out the key terms and conditions for the MostBet Pragmatic Play Drops & Wins promotion. Visit the official site for a full list of qualifying criteria and rules.

  • The promotion runs from March 4, 2026, 19:01 CEST to April 1, 2026, 18:59 CEST.
  • Only registered and logged-in players at MostBet casino can participate.
  • The event includes Daily Tournaments and Weekly Wheel Drops.
  • Weekly Wheel Drops prizes total €350,000 per week.
  • The Daily Tournament prize pool is €20,000, divided among the top 500 players.
  • Only spins of €0.15 or more qualify for the Daily Tournament.
  • Only the first 5,000 qualifying bets per day count toward tournament rankings.
  • Players may win multiple prizes during the promotion.
  • All decisions regarding prize allocation are final once published.
  • The organiser may disqualify participants in cases of fraud or rule violations.
